overview: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati), established in 2015, is a premier autonomous technical institute located in Yerpedu, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh. As one of the rapidly growing third-generation IITs, the institute is recognized for its sustainable green campus, globally qualified faculty, strong research ecosystem, and industrial collaborations under the mentorship of IIT Madras during its formative years.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance under the Institutes of Technology Act, 1961.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹2,00,000 per academic year for General/OBC students with family income above ₹5 lakh. Students with income between ₹1 lakh–₹5 lakh receive 2/3 fee remission (~₹66,666/year). Students with income below ₹1 lakh receive full tuition waiver. SC/ST/PwD students receive 100% tuition fee waiver.
Approximately ₹20,000 – ₹40,000 per academic year depending on program and semester structure.

placements.totalOffers: Strong placement performance across core engineering and IT sectors
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Adobe, IBM, Accenture, Deloitte, LTI, Mathworks, Toshiba, CDAC
placements.internationalOffers: Multiple high-value opportunities through global technology recruiters

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are conducted through JEE Advanced followed by JoSAA counseling. Postgraduate admissions are based on GATE or IIT JAM scores depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow JoSAA, COAP, and IIT academic calendar schedules.

campus.area: Modern green campus located in Yerpedu, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges range between ₹54,000 – ₹60,000 annually. Hostel seat rent is approximately ₹7,000 per semester, while mess advance is around ₹19,250 per semester.

hostelAndMess.messFacilities: Nutritious vegetarian and non-vegetarian meal options available on designated days.

scholarships.name: Merit-cum-Means (MCM) Scholarship
scholarships.benefits: Full tuition fee waiver + ₹1,000/month pocket allowance
scholarships.eligibility: Available for 25% of General/OBC students with parental income below ₹4.5 LPA

scholarships.name: Institute SC/ST Scholarship
scholarships.benefits: Free basic mess menu, hostel rent exemption, ₹250/month pocket allowance
scholarships.eligibility: SC/ST students with parental income below ₹4.5 LPA

scholarships.name: Institute Free Studentship
scholarships.eligibility: 10% of students with parental income below ₹4.5 LPA who are not receiving MCM scholarship

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati, Yerpedu, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh – 517619, India
